testcase.name: runScenario["Complete DSA Portal to Jarvis Portal Handoff using Context Bridge", "Unsecured Business Loan End-to-End Workflow"](1)

&amp#27;[1;36mRequest method: POST&amp#27;[0m Request URI: https://mystique.uat.creditsaison.corp/addKyc?kycType=pancard Query params: {kycType=pancard} &amp#27;[1;33mRequest Body: { "input": { "pan": "NRZPK4139W", "consent": "Y" }, "output": { "requestId": "d041f16d-902f-4ced-a365-427de20f2e78", "result": { "pan": "NRZPK4139W", "name": "Shea Test", "firstName": "Shea", "middleName": "", "lastName": "Test", "gender": "F", "aadhaarLinked": true, "aadhaarMatch": true, "dob": "2004-02-23", "address": { "buildingName": "2/21 RAM WADI", "locality": "JOGESHWARI SOUTH", "streetName": "AGARWAL NGR CAVES RD", "pinCode": "400060", "city": "MUMBAI", "state": "MAHARASHTRA", "country": "" }, "mobileNo": null, "emailId": null, "profileMatch": [ { "parameter": "address", "matchScore": 0.99, "matchResult": true }, { "parameter": "name", "matchScore": 1, "matchResult": true }, { "parameter": "dob", "matchScore": 1, "matchResult": true } ], "authorizedSignatory": { "pan": "", "name": "", "firstName": "", "middleName": "", "lastName": "", "gender": "", "aadhaarLinked": null, "dob": "", "mobileNo": "", "emailId": "", "address": { "buildingName": "", "locality": "", "streetName": "", "pinCode": "", "city": "", "state": "", "country": "" } }, "status": "Active", "issueDate": "2016-06-28", "isSalaried": true, "isDirector": false, "isSoleProp": false }, "statusCode": 101 } }&amp#27;[0m
Response Status: HTTP/1.1 200 OK &amp#27;[1;33mResponse Body: { "message": "Added a new kyc of type pancard with id- NRZPK4139W" }&amp#27;[0m ====================================================================
